params.name: Apollo Program
params.description:
On Apr 1, 1961 AD, the United States began the Apollo program.
To achieve manned lunar exploration and conduct on-site investigations of the moon, the United States initiated the Apollo program. This program lasted more than ten years and consumed over 25 billion dollars. Eventually, the Apollo 11 spacecraft successfully landed on the lunar surface. This historic achievement not only marked a significant milestone in space exploration but also provided a wealth of invaluable data about the mo …
